summary: Frontend-only mobile UI testing of Carnet Phyto (Expo/RN web preview, 390x844). End-to-end flow verified: create Field (Blé tendre, 5,2 ha) → create Product (Roundup, 10 L, threshold 5) → record Treatment via dashboard CTA (field picker, water 150 L/ha, dose 1,5 L/ha, total bouillie 780 L computed correctly, total quantity 7,8 L computed correctly, 'Stock insuffisant' warning shown when dose=3 → 15,6 L) → save → stock decrement to 2,2 L (10 - 7,8) → 'Stock bas' badge appears on product card → dashboard 'Stock bas (1)' alert appears → Export tab shows correct stats and PDF/CSV buttons trigger without crashing. All French UI labels render correctly (Carnet Phyto, Hors-ligne, Champs, Produits, Traitements, Accueil, Export, Désherbage, Fongique, etc.).

ui_bugs.issue: tabBarTestID does not propagate to data-testid in expo-router web preview, so tab bar items cannot be selected via [data-testid="tab-home"] etc. Workaround: select by visible French label. On native Android (APK target) this is irrelevant. Optional improvement: wrap each tab in custom tabBarButton with View testID, or document this limitation.

integration_issues.flow: Delete treatment / field / product confirmation on web preview
integration_issues.issue: Alert.alert with [Annuler, Supprimer] buttons may not auto-confirm on web preview (RN-Web maps to a custom modal/window.confirm where the cancel button is treated first). Treatment delete therefore did not refund stock during automated web test. This is a WEB PREVIEW limitation only — on native (target Android APK) Alert.alert renders correctly with both buttons and works as designed. Storage code (deleteTreatment refund logic in /app/frontend/src/storage.ts:154-164) is correct.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — non-blocking, RN Web compatibility warning.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Document web-preview limitation: Alert.alert confirmation dialogs (delete flows) should be tested on a real Android device or emulator since RN-Web's mapping can prevent the destructive button from being tapped in automation. Native target works correctly.
(Optional) For better testability on web preview, replace tabBarTestID with a custom tabBarButton that exposes data-testid; not required for the Android APK MVP.
critical_code_review_comments: storage.ts: stock refund/decrement logic on save/edit/delete is correct and idempotent (Math.max(0, ...)).
treatment-form.tsx: real-time computation of totalQty (dose × area) and total bouillie (water × area) is correct; insufficient-stock warning displays as expected.
All interactive elements except the bottom tabs expose proper testID/data-testid attributes.
All UI text is in French; metric units (ha, L, kg, L/ha) used consistently.
App is fully offline (AsyncStorage only); no /api calls observed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on core flows (create field, create product, treatment form with all controls, stock decrement, low-stock badge & alert, total bouillie computation, insufficient-stock warning, PDF/CSV export buttons)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 field 'TEST Champ' (5,2 ha, Blé tendre), 1 product 'TEST Roundup' (Herbicide, 10 L, threshold 5), 1 treatment (Désherbage, 150 L/ha, dose 1,5 L/ha) via UI in AsyncStorage. Cleared via Export → 'Tout effacer' at the start.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use mobile viewport 390x844. Tab bar testIDs do NOT work on web preview — select tabs via page.get_by_text('Accueil'|'Champs'|'Traitements'|'Produits'|'Export', exact=True).last. All other testIDs (add-field-btn, field-name-input, field-area-input, field-crop-input, field-save-btn, add-product-btn, product-name-input, product-stock-input, product-threshold-input, product-save-btn, dashboard-new-treatment-btn, treatment-field-btn, picker-field-*, water-150/100/80/200/custom, treatment-add-product-btn, picker-product-*, dose-*, treatment-submit-btn, export-pdf-btn, export-csv-btn, reset-data-btn) work as expected. RN-Web Alert.alert delete confirmations don't auto-confirm in Playwright on web; verify deletion flows on a native device or by directly calling deleteTreatment() in tests. App is offline — no backend testing needed.
rca_of_issue: No critical bugs. The only observed automation failure (REFUND_NOT_LOW) is rooted in RN-Web's Alert.alert mapping: clicking the in-card 'trash' icon fires Alert.alert with [Annuler, Supprimer]; on web the default button selection cancelled the delete, so stock was not refunded in the automation. The underlying deleteTreatment storage logic is correct (storage.ts:154-164 iterates products and calls adjustStock(productId, +(dose*area))). Mitigation for testing: bypass the Alert by triggering deleteTreatment via storage.ts in unit tests, or test on a real Android device/emulator. No code change required for the MVP.
